name: "The show" / [Horror]
description:
"Warning, this is an emergency notice from the US government. All television channels are being shut down due to the appearance of a sudden strange TV show, dubbed 'The Show'. Don't look up the Show, it's extremely dangerous because we don't really know what it's about. If you ask someone who has seen the show what it is about, they will say it is just the show. If they ask you if you have seen the show, say yes and don't question it, or they will come after you. Three of them to be exact, humanoid beings with strange shapes will hunt you. If you see a flashing red or white light and loud static sounds, hide as quickly as possible, because if they find you, they will take you to be part of the show."

Haunter

Haunter is the first member of the "Show", being a female humanoid figure, she is the first to appear after the viewer comes into contact with the show through some electronic device, mainly TVs, or when one of the program's audience finds out that the person hasn't seen the program. When a viewer of the show discovers that an individual has not watched the "Show", Haunter is the first to go after that individual. On the first few nights, Haunter will only watch the target from afar, always at a distance, she is mainly seen at night, but can appear during the day, in shadows in the distance or inside the target's house. She hides mainly in shadows and in hidden and distant places, always observing and analyzing the target, she always causes severe insomnia, headaches, nausea, dizziness and mild confusion when she is close to the target. Her job is to observe the target and pass information about it to the other two members of the Show, Seeker and Executor.

Haunter's danger level is low, as it does not attack the target directly and disappears if it is noticed for too long, but it can cause great psychological and emotional damage to the target, such as paranoia, insomnia, schizophrenia, depression and such. She never speaks and attempts at contact are futile, as she hates talking to humans and avoids direct contact. The Seeker's role, besides analyzing the target, is to indirectly convince him to give in and watch the show, becoming one of the viewers.

In terms of appearance, Haunter is a humanoid female figure of deep black coloration, with a thin, tall and slender body, she has long limbs and her face is white, usually without a mouth and similar to a mask. She has two dark holes in her white face. She has no eyes, but she always appears to be crying a black liquid. Sometimes she appears to have a subtle smile on her face. She is around 7'3" in height, but her height is not exact, as she always changes her size to be able to observe her target from the window, her favorite lookout spot.

Seeker

Seeker is the second member of the "Show", similar to Haunter, she is a female humanoid figure with intense black coloring, but she has a different role. Seeker appears after the target's initial nights of contact with the "Show", her role is to perform more evasive analysis and torture on the target, but not directly deadly. After the first few nights, Haunter's presence in the target's life will be replaced by Seeker's presence, w
